wiki_catalogs.name: Project Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the SmartConvert project overview section focused on introducing the multi-format document conversion tool. Explain its purpose as a web-based document format converter supporting Word, PDF, Text, and Markdown transformations. Document the core objectives including high-fidelity format conversion, responsive modern UI experience, and high-performance backend processing engine. Include the target audience comprising developers, writers, and students. Provide an overview of the bidirectional conversion capabilities and the overall system architecture approach. Use terminology consistent with the requirements documentation and include practical examples demonstrating the tool's value proposition.
wiki_catalogs.dependent_files: 多格式文档互转工具 (SmartConvert) 需求文档.md

wiki_catalogs.name: Convert Endpoint
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for the POST /api/convert endpoint focused on the core document conversion functionality. Document the multipart/form-data request structure with file upload handling, targetFormat parameter specification, and supported format combinations (DOCX↔MD, PDF↔MD, TXT↔MD). Detail the response formats including file streams, download links, and error responses. Include request validation rules, file size limits, supported MIME types, and conversion workflow. Provide practical examples of API usage with curl commands and client implementation patterns. Address error handling strategies for invalid formats, processing failures, and timeout scenarios. Document performance considerations, rate limiting recommendations, and security measures for file uploads.
wiki_catalogs.dependent_files: 多格式文档互转工具 (SmartConvert) 需求文档.md

wiki_catalogs.name: Drag-and-Drop Upload System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the drag-and-drop upload system component. Document the Vercel/Apple-style drag zone implementation with visual feedback during drag operations, file type validation and size restrictions, drop zone styling with hover states and active indicators, file selection modal integration, and progress indication during upload. Explain the technical implementation using HTML5 File API, drag event handling, file validation logic, and integration with the backend conversion service. Include practical examples of component configuration, error handling for invalid files, and accessibility considerations for screen readers and keyboard navigation.
wiki_catalogs.dependent_files: 多格式文档互转工具 (SmartConvert) 需求文档.md

wiki_catalogs.name: Word (.docx) Processing
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the Word (.docx) processing conversion module. Document the Apache POI library integration for reading and writing Word documents. Explain the bidirectional conversion between DOCX and Markdown, focusing on header preservation, list structure maintenance, table formatting, and bold text handling. Detail the parsing algorithms for extracting structured content from DOCX files and generating equivalent Markdown syntax. Include examples of complex Word layouts and their conversion outcomes. Document the fallback mechanisms for unsupported formatting elements and provide troubleshooting guidance for common conversion issues. Address performance considerations and memory management for large documents.
wiki_catalogs.dependent_files: 多格式文档互转工具 (SmartConvert) 需求文档.md

wiki_catalogs.name: Technology Stack

Document the frontend stack including Vue 3/React 18 with Vite build tools, Element Plus/Ant Design UI libraries, Tailwind CSS styling, Pinia/Redux Toolkit state management, and animation libraries. Detail the backend technology including Spring Boot 3.x framework, Apache POI for Word processing, flexmark-java for Markdown parsing, iText7/OpenHTMLtoPDF for PDF manipulation, and optional Pandoc integration. Include the deployment stack with Docker, Docker Compose, and Nginx. Explain the rationale behind technology choices, version compatibility requirements, and integration patterns. Provide practical examples of how these technologies work together to achieve the project goals.

Document error responses for invalid parameters and empty result sets.

wiki_overview.content:
Based on my analysis, this appears to be a requirements documentation file for a SmartConvert project rather than a complete source code repository. Let me examine the content more thoroughly to understand the project scope and generate a comprehensive analysis.

<blog>

# SmartConvert - 多格式文档互转工具项目分析

## 1. 项目介绍

### 1.1 项目概述
SmartConvert 是一款基于 Web 的文档格式转换工具，专为开发者、撰稿人和学生设计，提供极简、高效且视觉精美的文档处理平台。

### 1.2 核心目标
- 实现高保真度的格式转换
- 提供响应式、现代化且符合审美的前端交互体验
- 构建基于 Spring Boot 的高性能后端处理引擎

### 1.3 目标用户
- 需要频繁进行文档格式转换的开发者
- 学术写作人员和研究人员
- 内容创作者和博客作者

## 2. 技术架构

### 2.1 技术栈选型

#### 前端技术栈
- **框架**: Vue 3 (Composition API) 或 React 18
- **构建工具**: Vite
- **UI 组件库**: Element Plus (Vue) 或 Ant Design (React)
- **样式库**: Tailwind CSS
- **状态管理**: Pinia (Vue) 或 Redux Toolkit (React)
- **动画库**: Framer Motion 或 GSAP

#### 后端技术栈
- **核心框架**: Spring Boot 3.x
- **核心库**:
  - Markdown 解析: flexmark-java
  - Word 处理: Apache POI
  - PDF 处理: iText7 或 OpenHTMLtoPDF
  - Pandoc 桥接 (可选): 系统调用 Pandoc
- **接口文档**: Swagger / Knife4j
- **文件上传**: Spring StandardMultipartHttpServletRequest

### 2.2 系统架构图

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Web客户端] --> B[前端应用层]
    B --> C[API网关/代理]
    C --> D[Spring Boot后端服务]
    D --> E[文件处理引擎]
    E --> F[格式转换器]
    F --> G[(临时文件存储)]
    
    H[拖拽上传组件] --> B
    I[实时预览组件] --> B
    J[进度反馈组件] --> B
    
    K[Word处理] --> F
    L[PDF处理] --> F
    M[Markdown处理] --> F
    N[文本处理] --> F
```

### 2.3 数据流架构

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant U as 用户
    participant F as 前端应用
    participant S as Spring Boot服务
    participant P as 文件处理引擎
    participant T as 转换器
    
    U->>F: 选择文件并拖拽上传
    F->>S: POST /api/convert 请求
    S->>P: 接收文件数据
    P->>T: 调用对应转换器
    T->>T: 执行格式转换
    T-->>P: 返回转换结果
    P-->>S: 返回文件流
    S-->>F: 下载链接/文件流
    F-->>U: 显示转换结果
```

## 3. 核心功能模块

### 3.1 核心转换模块

#### 支持的转换路径
1. **Word (.docx) ↔ Markdown**: 保留标题、列表、表格和加粗等基本样式
2. **PDF (.pdf) ↔ Markdown**:
   - PDF 转 MD：提取文本内容，尽量保持层级
   - MD 转 PDF：支持代码高亮渲染后的美化导出
3. **Text (.txt) ↔ Markdown**: 纯文本与 Markdown 格式的封装与去格式化

### 3.2 用户界面需求

#### UI 特性
- **深色模式支持**: 一键切换深浅色主题
- **拖拽上传**: 仿制 Vercel 或 Apple 风格的拖拽上传区域
- **实时预览**: Markdown 转换前/后的实时预览窗口（左编辑右预览）
- **进度反馈**: 带有动效的转换进度条（Processing...）
- **批量处理**: 支持一次性上传多个文件并打包下载

### 3.3 后端 API 功能

#### 核心接口
- **POST /api/convert**: 核心转换接口，接收文件、源格式、目标格式
- **GET /api/history**: 查看最近转换记录
- **GET /api/health**: 系统健康检查

## 4. 部署架构

### 4.1 部署环境
- **容器化**: Docker & Docker Compose
- **服务器**: Nginx (前端静态资源路由)

### 4.2 部署流程图

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[开发环境] --> B[构建镜像]
    B --> C[Docker Compose]
    C --> D[Nginx容器]
    C --> E[Spring Boot容器]
    
    F[前端构建] --> G[静态资源]
    G --> D
    
    H[后端编译] --> I[可执行JAR]
    I --> E
    
    D --> J[反向代理]
    E --> J
    J --> K[生产环境]
```

## 5. 性能与安全考虑

### 5.1 性能要求
- 单个 10MB 以内的文档转换时间应在 3 秒内完成

### 5.2 安全措施
- 上传文件后缀严格校验，防止恶意脚本注入
- 转换后的临时文件定期清理（使用 @Scheduled 定时任务）

### 5.3 易用性设计
- 无需注册即可使用基础转换功能

## 6. 项目路线图

### 6.1 开发阶段规划

```mermaid
gantt
    title SmartConvert 开发路线图
    dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
    section Phase 1
    环境搭建      :2024-01-01, 2024-01-15
    section Phase 2  
    核心算法开发  :2024-01-16, 2024-02-15
    section Phase 3
    前端原型设计  :2024-02-16, 2024-03-15
    section Phase 4
    前后端联调    :2024-03-16, 2024-04-15
    section Phase 5
    UI细节打磨    :2024-04-16, 2024-05-15
```

### 6.2 关键里程碑
- **Phase 1**: 环境搭建，Spring Boot 基础骨架搭建
- **Phase 2**: 开发 Word/Text 与 MD 的互转核心算法
- **Phase 3**: 前端原型设计，完成拖拽上传组件与预览组件
- **Phase 4**: 前后端联调，处理 PDF 转换的复杂样式兼容
- **Phase 5**: UI 细节打磨，部署上线

## 7. 设计理念

### 7.1 界面设计建议
1. **配色方案**: 采用极简白/石墨黑，点缀色使用 Indigo (600) 或 Emerald (500)
2. **卡片式布局**: 转换工具箱采用悬浮卡片感，增加 backdrop-blur 效果
3. **交互反馈**: 按钮点击时的微互动（Micro-interactions），上传成功后的 Toast 提示

### 7.2 用户体验
- 极简主义设计原则
- 流畅的动画过渡效果
- 直观的操作流程
- 即时的反馈机制

## 8. 总结与建议

### 8.1 项目优势
- 现代化的技术栈组合，确保良好的开发体验和运行性能
- 全栈解决方案，从前端到后端的完整覆盖
- 注重用户体验的设计理念
- 清晰的开发路线图和阶段性目标

### 8.2 技术挑战
- 不同文档格式间的复杂转换算法实现
- PDF 转换的样式保持和布局还原
- 大文件处理的性能优化
- 多格式兼容性的测试验证

### 8.3 发展建议
- 建立完善的测试体系，特别是格式转换的准确性测试
- 考虑添加更多文档格式的支持
- 实施监控和日志系统，便于问题排查
- 考虑云存储集成，支持大文件处理

---

**Sources:**
- [多格式文档互转工具 (SmartConvert) 需求文档.md](多格式文档互转工具 (SmartConvert) 需求文档.md)

</blog>
